# gss_inquire_cred(_:_:_:_:_:_:)

**Function**

Obtains information about a credential.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_inquire_cred(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ cred_handle: gss_cred_id_t?, _ name_ret: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_name_t?>?, _ lifetime: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>?, _ cred_usage: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_cred_usage_t>?, _ mechanisms: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_OID_set?>?) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **cred_handle**: The credential to inspect. Use [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_NO_CREDENTIAL] to inquire about the default initiator principal.
- **name_ret**: A pointer the function uses to return the name that the credential asserts. Use [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_name(_:_:)] to free the name  object’s memory when you are done with it. Set the parameter to `NULL` to ignore this output.
- **lifetime**: A pointer the function uses to return the number of seconds for which the credential will remain valid, or 0 if the credential is expired. For credentials that do not support expiry, the function returns [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_INDEFINITE]. Set to `NULL` to ignore this output.
- **cred_usage**: A pointer the function uses to return the credential usage. The value is one of [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_ACCEPT], [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_INITIATE], or [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_BOTH]. Set to `NULL` to ignore this output.
- **mechanisms**: A pointer the function uses to return the set of mechanisms that the credential supports. Use [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_oid_set(_:_:)] to free the set’s memory when you are done with it. Set the parameter to `NULL` to ignore this output.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a description of other status outputs.

## Inquiries

- **gss_inquire_cred_by_mech(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)**: Obtains per-mechanism information about a credential.
- **gss_inquire_cred_by_oid(_:_:_:_:)**: Inquires about a particular characteristic of a credential.
- **GSSCredentialGetLifetime(_:)**: Returns the remaining time in seconds before the credential expires.
